records.question: Which actors playing Susan Kennedy have their musical linked to another actor?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
JOIN actor AS actor__1 ON actor.musical_id = actor__1.actor_id
WHERE actor.character = 'Susan Kennedy'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a1.Actor_ID
FROM actor a1
WHERE a1.Character = 'Susan Kennedy'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM actor a2
    WHERE a2.Musical_ID = a1.Musical_ID
      AND a2.Actor_ID <> a1.Actor_ID
)

records.question: Which actors named Ian Smith who played Harold Bishop and are exactly 17 years old have a duration containing 1996–2009?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
WHERE actor.duration LIKE '%1996–2009%' AND actor.age = 17 AND actor.name = 'Ian Smith' AND actor.character = 'Harold Bishop'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id
FROM actor
WHERE actor.Name = 'Ian Smith'
  AND actor.Character = 'Harold Bishop'
  AND actor.age = 17
  AND actor.Duration LIKE '%1996–2009%'
